short_description: Recurring VPN failures after Windows patching
description: Multiple incidents reported over the past month related to VPN authentication failures following Windows patch deployments. Root cause analysis underway. Suspected issue: certificate store not being updated correctly during patch process, causing VPN client to reject the internal CA certificate. Workaround (patch rollback) is not sustainable long-term.

short_description: Recurring R package dependency conflicts on research cluster
description: R package dependency conflicts on the research cluster have recurred across multiple R version upgrades. Root cause: the cluster's base R environment is not pinned and upgrades break package compatibility for production analysis scripts. Need to implement reproducible environment management (e.g., renv or conda) to prevent future breakage.

short_description: GPO network drive mapping failures — timing issue on fast boot
description: Network drive mappings via GPO login script have failed intermittently for multiple users across different workstations and user accounts. Incidents span multiple months. Root cause may be timing issue with GPO script execution before network is fully available on login, particularly for users with SSD-equipped machines that boot faster than the script timeout.

short_description: Okta MFA push failures recurring after app updates on iOS
description: MFA push notification failures on iOS have been reported after each of the last two Okta app updates. Pattern suggests the Okta app update process resets push notification permissions on iOS 17+. Problem record opened to track and formalize a post-update remediation procedure so this does not recur with future Okta app releases.
